query: SELECT LEFT(p.batchNo, 3) AS batchPrefix, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') AS ePhotoSyncStatus, COUNT(*) AS rowCount FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND (p.batchNo LIKE '005%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '013%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '019%') GROUP BY LEFT(p.batchNo, 3), JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') ORDER BY batchPrefix, ePhotoSyncStatus;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT LEFT(p.batchNo, 3) AS batchPrefix, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') AS ePhotoSyncStatus, COUNT(*) AS rowCount FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND (p.batchNo LIKE '005%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '013%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '019%') GROUP BY LEFT(p.batchNo, 3), JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') ORDER BY batchPrefix, ePhotoSyncStatus;
